hold_time_analysis_v2.finding: Hold threshold (3.0h) is only 0.3h below win median (3.3h) — 9% margin. This means 50% of wins that close exactly at 3.3h median are at risk of being held open until threshold (3.0h) without extra benefit. Recommend evaluating 2.5h threshold post-restart: wider 0.8h margin from win median, still 1.0h above loss median (1.5h). Filters noise stops while giving wins space.
hold_time_analysis_v2.recommendation: EVALUATE: test 2.5h vs 3.0h threshold in first 50 trending trades post-restart
